caption: A dark, blue-toned scene shows a crowd of people in the background, though they are heavily blurred and shadowed. Yellow graphic elements transition across the screen. Initially, a yellow circular outline containing a chevron-like shape appears in the upper right. As the sequence progresses, a different yellow emblem appears in the lower left, featuring a circle containing a stylized "M" with a small white dot beneath it. Finally, a bright yellow and white circular logo appears in the lower right, incorporating a similar chevron shape within a segmented ring. The background remains a dimly lit, crowded environment throughout, with the glowing yellow graphics serving as the primary focal point against the dark blue backdrop.
